Ahh, I’m wasting my time.

Quill puts the truck in gear and accelerates.
EXT. DEEPER IN THE JUNGLE <- DAY

The truck reaches a spot where the dirt road literally
runs out. Quill and his men are met with a wall of
thick, overgrown jungle foliage. They all climb fron
the truck. |

QUILL
It’s on foot from here.
(unfolds map)
Zak! Take a look. Which vay?

Zak glances at the map, then at the jungle, then steps
away, shaking his head and mumbling softly.

QUILL
What now? Morgan, what’s his
problem now?!

Morgan confers with Zak.

PHANTOM

falls through as well. But he hooks his arn over a

And now the truck begins to SHIFT. The bridge SQUEAKS
and GROANS. Additional ropes begin to SNAP. Wood
planks fall, just missing Phantom’s head.

. |

She climbs from the cockpit onto the wing, then --

EXT. JUNGLE = DAY
Diana takes a well-traveled path that leads her to a

PHANTOM

bathing in the river. His back is to her, so she

In less than a moment, Devil appears ... and he isn’t

Then, a strange thing happens. Phantom begins to

now Phantom is SCRATCHING THE LION'S BELLY!

) DIANA

EXT. THE SKULL CAVE - DAY

Diana and Horton leave the location of the Skull Cave
on slow moving horses. Diana looks back over her
shoulder, she can’t take her eyes off the place.
Horton catches her and reacts with a knowing look.

HORTON
Quite a fellow, isn’t he?

Diana doesn’t respond. She just turns around and
faces forward, her fingers touching the black pearls

around her neck.

INT. THE SKULL CAVE - CHRONICLE CHAMBER
